title: calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. costatifrons
intro: Calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. costatifrons is a plant species within the palm family, native to Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Calyptrogyne costatifrons subsp. costatifrons is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being applied topically in the form of creams and ointments.
